old_claim.note: Industrial Safety Regulation provides a capability that enables this technology without being the only possible path.

new_claim.note: German statutory accident insurance combined compensation with accident-prevention duties from the outset, making industrial safety regulation part of the operating model.

source_shape.source_locator: Brief History: DGUV says prevention of accidents was an important function of statutory accident insurance institutions from the outset, enabling prevention and rehabilitation to be combined.
source_shape.source_claim_summary: DGUV identifies accident prevention as an original function of the statutory accident insurance institutions.
source_shape.source_support_rationale: This supports safety regulation as an enabling operating function because the scoped insurance system includes prevention duties, not just cash compensation after injuries.

invariant_preserved_or_changed: Preserved: occupational_accident_insurance remains enabled by industrial_safety_regulation, now with official-source evidence.
would_reject_if: The node is later narrowed to cash benefits only, excluding prevention and safety incentives.
A stronger source shows prevention was added only much later and was not part of the 1884 statutory accident insurance function.
The industrial_safety_regulation node is narrowed away from accident prevention and occupational safety duties.
short_reason: DGUV says accident prevention was an original statutory accident insurance function.
